accurate.why: All project descriptions, locations, and dollar amounts match the bill text.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or incorrect claims; minor typo ('eachproject') is a formatting issue not a factual error.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the act as authorizing 11 VA major medical facility projects for FY2024.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The act provides new project-specific authorization rather than amending existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes per-project spending caps for all 11 projects.

effective_dates.why: Notes FY2024 authorization and November 25, 2024, approval date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all 11 projects and the $3,354,048,000 appropriation authorization.

coherent.why: Well-organized; the minor typo does not impair readability.

concise.why: Itemizes all 11 projects individually with full descriptions; more detailed than needed for a summary.

correct_entities.why: VA Secretary and all project locations correctly named.

correct_figures.why: All per-project amounts and the total $3,354,048,000 match the bill text.
